properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL for the EduRite web application.

properties.name: app.backend-base-url
properties.description: Public base URL for backend callbacks and generated API links.

properties.name: app.frontend.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL for frontend redirects.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Legacy frontend redirect URL used by payment and auth flows.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed by CORS.

properties.name: edurite.seed.enabled
properties.description: Enables or disables startup data seeders.

properties.name: edurite.auth.google.client-id
properties.description: Google OAuth client ID used for token validation.

properties.name: edurite.payment.payfast.return-url
properties.description: PayFast browser return URL after payment.

properties.name: edurite.payment.payfast.cancel-url
properties.description: PayFast browser return URL after cancellation.
